LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HARDWARE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM DEFENDANT KEMET ZACHARIAH BENDER AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,265.00 IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR # 5797 301/PHA
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-09-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HARDWARE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM DEFENDANT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $390, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-10-2010 Off Calendar

Application For Osc Re Contempt
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HARDWARE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY's Application For Order to show cause Re Contempt.
Transferred to Department 612, to be heard by Commissioner Everett Hewlett. Judge Peter J. Busch. Not reported.

Matter On Calendar For Tuesday, October 5, 2010, Line 1. Plaintiff American Hardware Mutual Insurance Company'S Application For Order To Show Cause Re Contempt.
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Michael e. McCabe, Esq, for plaintiff and moving party American Hardware Mutual Insurance Company, appearing by telephone.
No appearance by defendant
After the hearing, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HARDWARE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY's Application For Order to show cause Re Contempt is taken off calendar, per moving party. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents From Deft Kemet Zachariah Bender And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,265.00
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HARDWARE MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents From Defendant is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $390, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
